text.title: AI-Native Product Development Operating Model Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Feature ships; users complain; team realizes there's no baseline to compare.
antipattern.root-cause: PRD did not specify eval set + thresholds.
antipattern.fix: Block PR merge until PRD cites eval_set_id + min thresholds.

antipattern.symptom: Two engineers edit the same prompt in prod; behavior changes for some users only.
antipattern.root-cause: Prompts stored as config blob, not versioned text.
antipattern.fix: Move prompts to repo; semver tags; PR review required.

antipattern.symptom: Feature leaks PII in production; rollback + incident.
antipattern.root-cause: Team skipped guardrail review to meet deadline.
antipattern.fix: Make guardrail review a non-skippable gate in release checklist.
